title: Stories from Spec
paragraph: Check out Special Collections and Archives' Harvester blog featuring the unique materials stewarded by the library.

image-caption: brightly colored drawing of a football player on the cover of a game day program
title: Digital Collections
paragraph: Discover tens of thousands of rare and unique items openly available online for research and learning

title: Featured Resource: Safari
paragraph: Access thousands of ebooks, videos, and courses in tech, business, communications, design, management, and more with Safari Books Online.

image-caption: Participants in the CDIL summer symposium 2017
title: Center for Digital Inquiry & Learning
paragraph: The only center of its kind in Idaho, CDIL provides digital scholarship research and learning opportunities on campus for faculty and students.

title: The Library Now Has Board Games!
paragraph: Need a study break? Take home one of the library's new board games! Find them on the first floor of the library by the magazines.

image-caption: Young Men Diving into Lake during CCC Carnival
title: Dive in!
paragraph: Take time to explore our digital collections featuring historic content from Special Collections.

image-caption: I-tower frost from UI Media Photoshelter
title: Winter Intersession Hours
paragraph: Keep warm and enjoy the winter break! Check our hours page for opening times during the intersession.

image-caption: U of I library with fall leaves
title: Welcome to the Library
paragraph: The library is open with new hours. Please check our Updates page for details.

image-caption: room with tables and archival materials
title: Spec Reading Room
paragraph: The Special Collections Reading Room has new hours! Visit us to explore our archival materials.

image-caption: stylized design featuring people looking at computers and maps and globes
title: GIS Day @ U of I
paragraph: Geoprivacy and the Ethics of Location: join us Nov 16th for this free event discussing geospatial research and technology. Register now!

image-caption: hand tools handing on wooden wall
title: Library Workshops!
paragraph: The library hosts workshops every week. Join us to learn about tools that impact your research or kick start your projects!

title: Chat help is available 24/7!
paragraph: Don't know where to start on that assignment? Get research help from a librarian 24 hours a day via chat!

image-caption: a pair of sunglasses sitting on the sand at the beach
title: Happy Summer!
paragraph: The Library's summer hours are in effect from May 14 - August 21. If you're not at the beach, stop by, we'd love to see you!

image-caption: U of I library with fall leaves
title: Welcome to the Library!
paragraph: Online and in-person we're the place where you can find information, resources, and spaces to help you succeed and create.

image-caption: front on branches in front of the I water tower
title: Welcome to the Library!
paragraph: Online and in-person we're the place where you can find information, resources, and spaces to help you succeed and create.

image-caption: student pulling book off of high shelf
title: Research Help Desk
paragraph: The Reference and Information Desk has moved to the 2nd floor! Head upstairs to chat with a librarian or visit our online help services.

image-caption: two people with microphones with a neon sign saying The Studio
title: The Studio
paragraph: The Studio offers dedicated space to students, staff, faculty, and the community to record, edit, and digitize audiovisual content.

title: Geospatial and Data Sciences Support
paragraph: The Data Hub provides support in the areas of GIS, data analysis, visualization, and research data management.

image-caption: Photograph of the MILL space showing 3d printers and computers
title: Visit The MILL
paragraph: Join us for workshops every week at the library's Making, Innovating, and Learning Laboratory (MILL)
